description: Verify role-specific workbench state for owner, project lead, member, approver, and viewer views.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; cp -a scripts "$tmp/scripts"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; "$office" project-create --project p1 --name 'Project One' --agents pm,coder >/dev/null; "$office" agent-invoke --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --user manager --role project_manager --project p1 --agent coder --task 'Build dashboard state' --run-id wb-run --task-id wb-task >/dev/null; "$office" approval-create --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --title 'Review risk' --action regulated_output.approve --resource-type workflow_run --resource-id wb-run --requested-by manager --requested-by-role project_manager --approver-role professional_reviewer --project p1 --workflow-run wb-run --task-id wb-task --risk regulated > "$tmp/approval.json"; "$office" workbench-state --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --user owner --role owner > "$tmp/owner.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["view"] == "owner_global" and "project_health" in data["sections"]' "$tmp/owner.json"; "$office" workbench-state --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --user manager --role project_manager --project p1 > "$tmp/lead.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["view"] == "project_lead" and "team_tasks" in data["sections"]' "$tmp/lead.json"; "$office" workbench-state --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --user manager --role member --project p1 > "$tmp/member.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["view"] == "member" and "my_tasks" in data["sections"]' "$tmp/member.json"; "$office" workbench-state --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --user reviewer --role professional_reviewer --project p1 > "$tmp/reviewer.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["view"] == "approver" and len(data["sections"]["pending_approvals"]) >= 1' "$tmp/reviewer.json"; "$office" workbench-state --tenant tenant-a --deployment dep-a --user viewer --role viewer --project p1 > "$tmp/viewer.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["view"] == "viewer" and "visible_projects" in data["sections"]' "$tmp/viewer.json"
